scripts.test: node -e "const { readdirSync, statSync } = require('node:fs'); const { join } = require('node:path'); const walk = (dir) => readdirSync(dir).flatMap((entry) => { const full = join(dir, entry); return statSync(full).isDirectory() ? walk(full) : full.endsWith('.test.js') ? [full] : []; }); const files = walk('dist'); if (files.length === 0) { throw new Error('No compiled test files found in dist.'); } require('node:child_process').spawnSync(process.execPath, ['--test', ...files], { stdio: 'inherit' });"
